description: Account book. In Ladino and at least one other language (Greek? Turkish?). Dating: Catalogued as 16th century, but unclear on what basis. People named include: Georgi; Paulo Khouri; Dimitri; Michalis Pappas; and several more. ASE.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בLadino, Unidentified language and script. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
